title: Discord Announcer
description: A simple announcer that will tell server users ur discord link in a configuarble time interval
body: This is a minimal plugin that lets you inform users of your Discord server via chat messages. In the configuration file you can change the message that is posted to your users in the chat and the link of your discord server. You are also able to change the time interval how often the message is posted. Default is set to 10 minutes (600 s) # COMMANDS /discord this command will display your discord link in the chat /discord reload reloading the config.yml # DEFAULT CONFIG ![DEFAULT CONFIG](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/455011d30435ea0945f467fc39219c680ae5ce7f.png) This is the default configuration file and in it you can change the message the users will recieve and the time interval for how often a the message will be sent. The "command-message" is the text that will be posted in chat when you use the /discord command.
